pick.rationale: This is a classic 2/15 seed matchup where two seeds historically win approximately 85-90% of the time in the Round of 64. Iowa State enters with a commanding 25-6 record and was ranked #7 in the AP Poll, representing a Power 5 Big 12 program with proven tournament-caliber talent. Tennessee State, while impressive as an OVC champion ending a 32-year drought at 23-9, is a mid-major team making their first NCAA tournament appearance in over three decades with no measurable advanced metrics to compete against a blue blood program. The conference pedigree gap, superior overall record, and historical precedent for 2-seeds overwhelmingly favor Iowa State, who should advance comfortably without needing exceptional performance.
